description: Style NoteCrafted with age old printing and dyeing traditions, each piece from fabindia is created by artisans from villages nestled in the green valleys of India. The brand considers ancient fabric weaving and dyeing techniques that are dying out and infuses them with new life by providing these craftsmen a viable market. This kurta is a unique piece fashioned to please not only those who love the simple life but also the style-consious global citizen. It looks great when styled with leggings.Product DetailsWhite kurta, has red floral print, a V-neckline, a half buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves and a vented hemMaterial and CareCottonDry clean onlySizeRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
